01-requirements/TRACEABILITY_MATRIX.md §"Notes on multi-file FRs (FR-03, FR-04)" (test-function split for FR-03/04)
summary: Authored P1 deliverable TEST_INVENTORY.yaml at /Users/johnny/projects/tts-new/TEST_INVENTORY.yaml. The file declares 10 inventory entries covering all 8 FRs (FR-01..FR-08): 1 entry each for FR-01/FR-02/FR-05/FR-06/FR-07/FR-08, and 2 entries each for FR-03 (core + edge cases) and FR-04 (concurrency + concatenation) per the bidirectional split declared in TRACEABILITY_MATRIX.md. Each entry has the required fields (fr_id, test_function, module, description, acceptance, priority); test_function names use the strict test_fr_<NN>_<slug> convention; modules live under tests/; priority is HIGH for all FRs except FR-06 (MEDIUM, matching SPEC's "optional" status). Acceptance criteria are measurable assertions citing specific constants (LEXICON_MIN_SIZE=50, MAX_CHARS_PER_REQUEST=250, CIRCUIT_BREAKER_THRESHOLD=3, CIRCUIT_BREAKER_TIMEOUT=10.0, TTL=86400) and exact string outputs (12 canonical mappings, 5 CLI patterns, ffmpeg argv shape). Total file length is 118 lines (>= 40 target). The file uses single-quoted YAML strings for acceptance fields to safely embed CJK characters, comparison operators, parentheses, and angle brackets without escaping. Naming authority is ready to be consumed by derive_test_cases.md at P2 to produce TEST_SPEC.md.
